---
title: "Louisa Catherine Palmer"
---

## Louisa Catherine Palmer

**Dates:** (d. 1868)

### Description

sister of Caroline (Palmer) Abraham and Mary Anne Palmer

### Biography

  They were third cousins of Roundell Palmer, 1st Earl of Selborne,  and first cousins of Sarah Harriet (Richardson) Selwyn.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th [1864]
- Letter from March 22d [1855]
- Letter from June 9, 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
